code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last_line = ""
mut found = false
mut start = 0
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_end = true
      end
    when None
      is_end = true
    end
  end

  if is_end
    let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
    let line_len = string.len(line)
    mut j = 0
    mut has_content = false
    while j < line_len
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(c)
        if c != 32 and c != 9 and c != 13
          has_content = true
        end
      when None
        j = line_len
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if has_content
      last_line = line
      found = true
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(last_line)
else
  println("(none)")
end
